column2: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਗਣਤੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਝਾਖ ਝਖੰਦੇ॥
column5: Even after listening to the Word of the Guru in the holy congregation those who toss between the feelings of loss and profit.

column2: ਕਪਟ ਸਨੇਹ ਨ ਥੇਹਿ ਜੜੰਦੇ॥੧੯॥
column5: Their false love cannot reach any place.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੦. ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਾਲਾ}
column5: I have all the vices of manmukh

column2: ਡਡੂ ਬਗਲੇ ਸੰਖ ਲਖ ਅਕ ਜਵਾਹੇ ਬਿਸੀਅਰ ਕਾਲੇ॥
column5: Millions of frogs, cranes, conches, plants of sandy regions (akk), camel, thorns (javas) black snakes;

column2: ਸਿੰਬਲ ਘੁੱਘੂ ਚਕਵੀਆਂ ਕੜਛ ਹਸਤਿ ਲਖ ਸੰਢੀ ਨਾਲੇ॥
column5: Silk cotton trees, owls, ruddy sheldrakes, ladles, elephants, barren women;

column2: ਪਥਰ ਕਾਵ ਰੋਗੀ ਘਣੇ ਗਦਹੁ ਕਾਲੇ ਕੰਬਲ ਭਾਲੇ॥
column5: Stones, crows, patients, donkeys, black blankets;

column2: ਕੈਹੈ ਤਿਲ ਬੂਆੜ ਲਖ ਅਕਤਿਡ ਅਰੰਡ ਤੁਮੇ ਚਿਤਰਾਲੇ॥
column5: Seedless sesame plants, castor, colocynths;

column2: ਕਲੀ ਕਨੇਰ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਸਭ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਮੈ ਤਨਿ ਭੀਹਾਲੇ॥
column5: Buds, oleanders (kaner) are there (in the world). All the deadly vices of all these I have in me.

column2: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਨ ਰਿਦੇ ਸਮਾਲੇ॥
column5: He, who even listening to the word of Guru in the holy congregation does not adopt the teachings of Guru in his heart.

column2: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਬੇਮੁਖ ਬੇਤਾਲੇ॥੨੦॥
column5: Is opposed to Guru and the life of such an imbalanced person is opprobrious.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੧. ਨਿੰਦਕਾਂ ਤੇ ਬੇਮੁਖਾਂ ਦੀ ਗਿਣਤੀ}
column5: Counting the slanderers and apostates

column2: ਲਖ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਲਖ ਬੇਮੁਖਾਂ ਦੂਤ ਦੁਸਟ ਲਖ ਲੂਣ ਹਰਾਮੀ॥
column5: Millions are slanderers, millions are apostates and millions of wicked persons are untrue to their salt.

column2: ਸ੍ਵਾਮਿ ਧੋਹੀ ਅਕ੍ਰਿਤਘਣਿ ਚੋਰ ਜਾਰ ਲਖ ਲਖ ਪਹਿਨਾਮੀ॥
column5: Unfaithful, ungrateful, thieves, vagabonds and millions of other infamous persons are there.

column2: ਬਾਮ੍ਹਣ ਗਾਈਂ ਵੰਸ ਘਾਤ ਲਾਇਤਬਾਰ ਹਜਾਰ ਅਸਾਮੀ॥
column5: Thousands are there who are slayers of Brahmin, cow, and their own family.

column2: ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੋਪ ਲਖ ਗੁਨਹਗਾਰ ਲਖ ਲਖ ਬਦਨਾਮੀ॥
column5: Millions of liars, prevaricators of the Guru, guilty and ill-reputed ones are there.

column2: ਅਪਰਾਧੀ ਬਹੁ ਪਤਿਤ ਲਖ ਅਵਗੁਣਿਆਰ ਖੁਆਰ ਖੁਨਾਮੀ॥
column5: Many a criminal, fallen, full of demerits and phoney people are there.

column2: ਲਖ ਲਿਬਾਸੀ ਦਗਾਬਾਜ ਲਖ ਸੈਤਾਨ ਸਲਾਮਿ ਸਲਾਮੀ॥
column5: Millions are there of variegated guises, cheats and friendly to Satan, exchanging greetings with them.

column2: ਤੂੰ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਹਉ ਮੁਕਰਾ ਹਉ ਕਪਟੀ ਤੂੰ ਅੰਤਰਿਜਾਮੀ॥
column5: O God, you all know how I am denying (after having your gifts). I am a cheat and O Lord, you are omniscient.

column2: ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣੁ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ॥੨੧॥੧੭॥
column5: O Master, you are uplifter of the fallen ones and your always keep your reputation.

column2: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ॥
column5: One Oankar, the primal energy, realized through the grace of divine preceptor

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧. ਮੰਗਲਾ ਚਰਣ}
column5: One Oankar, the primal energy, realized through the grace of divine preceptor

column2: ਇਕ ਕਵਾਉ ਪਸਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਓਅੰਕਾਰ ਅਨੇਕ ਅਕਾਰਾ॥
column5: By one bang, the Oankar created and spread myriad of forms.

column2: ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੋ ਧਰਤਿ ਅਗਾਸਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਵਿਥਾਰਾ॥
column5: He extended His self in the form of air, water, fire, earth and sky etc.

column2: ਜਲ ਥਲ ਤਰਵਰ ਪਰਬਤਾਂ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਅਗਣਤ ਅਪਾਰਾ॥
column5: He created water, land, trees, mountains and many biotic communities.

column2: ਇਕੁ ਵਰਭੰਡੁ ਅਖੰਡੁ ਹੈ ਲਖ ਵਰਭੰਡ ਪਲਕ ਪਲਕਾਰਾ॥
column5: That supreme creator Himself is indivisible and in one wink of an eye can create millions of universes.

column2: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਕਾਦਰੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਾ॥
column5: When boundaries of His creation are unknowable, how can the expanse of that Creator be known?

column2: ਅੰਤੁ ਬਿਅੰਤ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰਾ॥੧॥
column5: No end is there of His extremes; they are infinite.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨. ਓਹੋ ਹੀ}
column5: Invocation

column2: ਕੇਵਡੁ ਵਡਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਵਡੇ ਦੀ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ॥
column5: How vast could He be said? The grandeur of the Great is great.

column2: ਵਡੀ ਹੂ ਵਡਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਆਖਣੁ ਆਖ ਸੁਣਾਈ॥
column5: I relate what I have heard that He is said to be the greatest of the great.

column2: ਰੋਮ ਰੋਮ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਖਿਓਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਵਰਭੰਡ ਕਰੋੜ ਸਮਾਈ॥
column5: Crores of universes reside in His trichome.

column2: ਇਕੁ ਕਵਾਉ ਪਸਾਉ ਜਿਸੁ ਤੋਲਿ ਅਤੋਲੁ ਨ ਤੁਲਿ ਤੁਲਾਈ॥
column5: None could be compared with Him Who created and spread everything with one bang.

column2: ਵੇਦ ਕਤੇਬਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ਕਥੀ ਨ ਜਾਈ॥
column5: He is beyond all the statements of the Vedas and the Katebas. His ineffable story is beyond all descriptions.

column2: ਅਬਿਗਤਿ ਗਤਿ ਕਿਵ ਅਲਖ ਲਖਾਈ॥੨॥
column5: How could His unmanifest dynamism by seen and understood?

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੩. ਕੁਦਰਤ ਵਿੱਚ ਕਾਰੀਗਰੀ ਹੈ}
column5: Craftsmanship is there in the creation

column2: ਜੀਉ ਪਾਇ ਤਨੁ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਅਖੀ ਨਕੁ ਕੰਨ ਸਵਾਰੇ॥
column5: Creating the jiva (self) He made his body and gave good shape to his mouth, nose, eyes and ears.

column2: ਹਥ ਪੈਰ ਦੇ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸੁਭ ਦਿਸਟਿ ਦੁਆਰੇ॥
column5: Gracefully He bestowed hands and feet, ears and consciousness for listening to the Word and eye for beholding goodness.

column2: ਕਿਰਤਿ ਵਿਰਤਿ ਪਰਕਿਰਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਸੰਜਾਰੇ॥
column5: For earning of the livelihood and other works, he infused life into body.

column2: ਰਾਗ ਰੰਗ ਰਸ ਪਰਸਦੇ ਗੰਧ ਸੁਗੰਧ ਸੰਧਿ ਪਰਕਾਰੇ॥
column5: He bestowed various techniques of assimilation of music, colours, smells and fragrances.

column2: ਛਾਦਨ ਭੋਜਨ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਲੁ ਟੇਕ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਵੀਚਾਰ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ॥
column5: For clothing and eating He gave wisdom, power, devotion, and discriminatory wisdom and thought process.

column2: ਦਾਨੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਬੇਸੁਮਾਰ ਦਾਤਾਰ ਪਿਆਰੇ॥
column5: The mysteries of that Bestower cannot be understood; that loving Donor keeps with Him myriad's of virtues.

column2: ਲੇਖ ਅਲੇਖ ਅਸੰਖ ਅਪਾਰੇ॥੩॥
column5: Beyond all accounts, He is infinite and unfathomable.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੪. ਕੁਦਰਤ ਲੇਖੇ ਵਿਚ ਹੈ}
column5: The creation is accountable

column2: ਪੰਜ ਤਤੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਕਰਿ ਖਾਣੀ ਚਾਰਿ ਜਗਤ ਉਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: Mixing the five elements from four (life) mines (egg, foetus, sweat, vegetation) the whole world was created.

column2: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀ ਜੂਨਿ ਵਿਚ ਆਵਾਗਵਣ ਚਲਤੁ ਵਰਤਾਇਆ॥
column5: Creating the eighty-four lakhs speicies of life, the feat of transmigration has been accomplished in them.

column2: ਇਕਸ ਇਕਸ ਜੂਨਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਅਣਗਣਤ ਵਧਾਇਆ॥
column5: In each one of the species many a creature has been produced.

column2: ਲੇਖੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭ ਕੋ ਸਭਨਾ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: All are responsible (for their actions) and carry writ of fate on their forehead.

column2: ਲੇਖੈ ਸਾਸ ਗਿਰਾਸ ਦੇ ਲੇਖ ਲਿਖਾਰੀ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: Every breath and morsel is counted. Mystery of writs and that Writer could not be known by any one.

column2: ਆਪ ਅਲੇਖੁ ਨ ਅਲਖ ਲਖਾਇਆ॥੪॥
column5: Himself imperceptible, He is beyond all writs.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੫. ਕੁਦਰਤ ਭੈ ਵਿਚ ਹੈ}
column5: Creation is in fear

column2: ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਧਰਤਿ ਆਗਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਾਧਾਰ ਭੈ ਭਾਰ ਧਰਾਇਆ॥
column5: Earth and sky are in fear but not held by any support, and, that Lord sustains them under the weight of fears.

column2: ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੋ ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਖੈ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ॥
column5: Keeping air, water and fire in fear (discipline). He has mixed them all (and has created the world).

column2: ਪਾਣੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਧਰਤਿ ਧਰਿ ਵਿਣੁ ਥੰਮ੍ਹਾ ਆਗਾਸੁ ਰਹਾਇਆ॥
column5: Setting earth in water He has established sky without the support of any props.

column2: ਕਾਠੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਧਰਿ ਕਰ ਪਰਫੁਲਤੁ ਸੁਫਲ ਫਲਾਇਆ॥
column5: He kept fire in wood and loading the trees with flowers and fruits made them meaningful.

column2: ਨਵੀ ਦੁਆਰੀ ਪਵਣੁ ਧਰਿ ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਚੰਦ ਚਲਾਇਆ॥
column5: Keeping air (life) in all the nine doors He made the sun and the moon to move in fear (discipline).

column2: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਰਾਇਆ॥੫॥
column5: That spotless Lord Himself is beyond all fears.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੬. ਕਾਦਰ ਬੇਓੜਕ ਪਰ ਵੵਾਪਕ ਹੈ}
column5: Creator is infinite and omnipresent

column2: ਲਖ ਅਸਮਾਣ ਉਚਾਣਿ ਚੜਿ ਉਚਾ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਅੰਬੜਿ ਸਕੈ॥
column5: Even mounting the lakhs of sky none can reach that highest Lord.

column2: ਉਚੀ ਹੂ ਊਚਾ ਘਣਾ ਥਾਉ ਗਿਰਾਉ ਨ ਨਾਉ ਅਥਕੈ॥
column5: He is higher than the highest; He has no (particular) place, residence, name and any fatigue.

column2: ਲਖ ਪਤਾਲ ਨੀਵਾਣਿ ਜਾਇ ਨੀਵਾ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਨੀਵੈ ਤਕੈ॥
column5: If someone goes low equal to millions of netherworlds even then he cannot behold Him.

column2: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਪਛਮਿ ਉਤਰਾਧਿ ਦਖਣਿ ਫੇਰਿ ਚਉਫੇਰਿ ਨ ਢਕੈ॥
column5: Even the covers of all the four directions - north, east, south, west, cannot over Him.

column2: ਓੜਕ ਮੂਲੁ ਨ ਲਭਈ ਉਤਪਤਿ ਪਰਲਉ ਅਖਿ ਫਰਕੈ॥
column5: His expanse cannot be attained; He by one wink of His eye can create and dissolute (the whole cosmos).

column2: ਫੁਲਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਾਸ ਮਹਕੈ॥੬॥
column5: As the fragrance adorns the flower, the Lord also is present everywhere.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੭. ਕੁਦਰਤ ਦਾ ਭੇਤ ਕਾਦਰ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ}
column5: Only Creator knows the mystery of creation

column2: ਓਅੰਕਾਰਿ ਅਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਥਿਤਿ ਨ ਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਮਾਹੁ ਜਣਾਇਆ॥
column5: About the day and month of the creation, the Creator has told nothing to anybody.

column2: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਆਕਾਰੁ ਵਿਣੁ ਏਕੰਕਾਰੁ ਨ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: The Formless One who resided in His own self did not make anybody see His imperceptible form.

column2: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਨਾਉਂ ਧਰਾਇਆ॥
column5: Himself He created all and Himself He (for the weal of creatures) established His name in their hearts.

column2: ਆਦਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਆਦੇਸੁ ਹੈ ਹੈ ਭੀ ਹੋਸੀ ਹੋਂਦਾ ਆਇਆ॥
column5: I bow before that primal Lord, who is there in the present, who will remain in the future and who was in the beginning as well.

column2: ਆਦਿ ਨ ਅੰਤੁ ਬਿਅੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਆਪ ਆਪਿ ਨ ਆਪੁ ਗਣਾਇਆ॥
column5: He is beyond beginning, beyond end and is infinite; but He never makes Himself noticed.

column2: ਆਪੇ ਆਪੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਸਮਾਇਆ॥੭॥
column5: He created the world and Himself subsumes it in His self.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੮. ਕਾਦਰ ਕੀਤੇ ਤੋਂ ਅਗੰਮ ਹੈ}
column5: The Creator is inaccessible for the creation

column2: ਰੋਮ ਰੋਮ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਖਿਓਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਵਰਭੰਡ ਕਰੋੜਿ ਸਮਾਈ॥
column5: In His one trichome He has subsumed crores of universes.

column2: ਕੇਵਡੁ ਵਡਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਕਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਜਾਈ॥
column5: What can be said about His expanse, His abode and the extent of His place?

column2: ਇਕੁ ਕਵਾਉ ਅਮਾਉ ਹੈ ਲਖ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਨ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ॥
column5: Even His one sentence is beyond all limits and its evaluation cannot be done by millions of rivers of knowledge.

column2: ਪਰਵਦਗਾਰੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਈ॥
column5: That sustainer of the world is inaccessible; his beginning and end is imperceptible.

column2: ਏਵਡੁ ਵਡਾ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਕਿਥੈ ਰਹਿਆ ਆਪੁ ਲੁਕਾਈ॥
column5: Being so much great where has He hidden Himself?

column2: ਸੁਰ ਨਰ ਨਾਥ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ॥੮॥
column5: To know this, the gods, men and many a nath are ever in concentration upon Him.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੯. ਕਾਦਰ ਕੀਤੇ ਤੋਂ ਅਗੰਮ ਹੈ}
column5: The Creator is inaccessible for the creation

column2: ਲਖ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਕਵਾਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਅਤਿ ਅਸਗਾਹ ਅਥਾਹ ਵਹੰਦੇ॥
column5: In His will lakhs of deep and unfathomable rivers (of life) go on flowing.

column2: ਆਦਿ ਨ ਅੰਤੁ ਬਿਅੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਫੇਰ ਫਿਰੰਦੇ॥
column5: Beginning and end of those life currents cannot be understood.

column2: ਅਲਖੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਰ ਲਹੰਦੇ॥
column5: They are infinite, inaccessible and imperceptible but still all move in the Lord, the great. They cannot know the extent of that imperceptible and boundless Lord.

column2: ਲਹਰਿ ਤਰੰਗ ਨਿਸੰਗ ਲਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੰਗਮ ਰੰਗ ਰਵੰਦੇ॥
column5: Rivers having myriad's of waves meeting the ocean becomes one with it.

column2: ਰਤਨ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਲਖ ਲਖ ਮੁਲਿ ਅਮੁਲਿ ਨ ਤੁਲਿ ਤੁਲੰਦੇ॥
column5: In that ocean are lakhs of invaluable jewel materials, which in fact are beyond all costing.

column2: ਸਦਕੇ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਿ ਸਿਰੰਦੇ॥੯॥
column5: I am sacrifice unto that Creator Lord.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੦. ਕਾਦਰ ਨਿਰਲੇਪ ਤੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੈ}
column5: The Creator is detached and perfect

column2: ਪਰਵਦਗਾਰੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਿਰਠਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਰੰਗ ਬਿਰੰਗੀ॥
column5: That sustainer Lord ought to be praised who has created the multicoloured creation.

column2: ਰਾਜਿਕੁ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਬਾਹਿਦਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਅਣਮੰਗੀ॥
column5: He is bestower of livelihood to everyone and giver of charity unasked for.

column2: ਕਿਸੈ ਜਿਵੇਹਾ ਨਾਹਿ ਕੋ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮੰਦੀ ਚੰਗੀ॥
column5: None resembles anyone and the jiva (creative) is good or bad according to the ratio of perplexity in him.

column2: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨਿਰਲੇਪੁ ਹੈ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਹਲੰਗੀ॥
column5: Being transcendent, He is detached from every thing and being perfect Brahm. He is always with everybody.

column2: ਵਰਨਾ ਚਿਹਨਾ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਹੈ ਸਰਬੰਗੀ॥
column5: He is beyond caste and symbols etc. but side by side He pervades one and all.

column2: ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਸੰਗੀ॥੧੦॥
column5: He is in air, water and fire i.e. He is the power of these elements.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੧. ਮਾਯਕ ਉਤਪਤੀ ਕਾਰਣ}
column5: Reasons for the creation of maya

column2: ਓਅੰਕਾਰਿ ਆਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਖੀ ਇਕ ਉਪਾਈ ਮਾਇਆ॥
column5: The Oankar creating the forms created a fly named maya.

column2: ਤਿਨਿ ਲੋਅ ਚਉਦਹ ਭਵਣੁ ਜਲ ਥਲੁ ਮਹੀਅਲੁ ਛਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਛਾਇਆ॥
column5: It cheated profusely all the three worlds, fourteen abodes, water, surface and the nether world.

column2: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨ ਮਹੇਸ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਦਸ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਬਜਾਰਿ ਨਚਾਇਆ॥
column5: All the ten incarnations, besides Brahma, Visnu, Mahesa, it made to dance in the bazar in the form of world.

column2: ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਆ ਸਿਧ ਨਾਥ ਬਹੁ ਪੰਥ ਭਵਾਇਆ॥
column5: The celibates, the chaste ones, the contented people, siddhas and naths all were made to move astray on the paths of various sects.

column2: ਕਾਮ ਕਰੋਧ ਵਿਰੋਧ ਵਿਚਿ ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹੁ ਕਰਿ ਧ੍ਰੋਹ ਲੜਾਇਆ॥
column5: Maya infused lust, anger, opposition, greed, infatuation, and deceit in all and made them to have infightings.

column2: ਹਉਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭਕੋ ਸੇਰਹੁ ਘਟਿ ਨ ਕਿਨੈ ਅਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: Full of ego they are hollow from inside but none accepts himself imperfect (all feel they are the full measure and nothing less than it).

column2: ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕਰਤੇ ਆਪੁ ਲੁਕਾਇਆ॥੧੧॥
column5: The Creator Lord Himself has concealed the reason for all this.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੨. ਹੁਕਮ}
column5: Majestic orders of the emperors

column2: ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹਾਂ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਹੈ ਅਬਚਲੁ ਰਾਜੁ ਵਡੀ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੀ॥
column5: He (the Lord) is emperor of emperors whose rule is stable and kingdom greatly large.

column2: ਕੇਵਡੁ ਤਖਤੁ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਦਰਗਾਹੀ॥
column5: How big are His throne, palace and the court.

column2: ਕੇਵਡੁ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਮਾਲੁ ਮੁਲਖੁ ਅਵਗਾਹੀ॥
column5: How should He be eulogised and how could be known the expanse of His treasure and territory?

column2: ਕੇਵਡੁ ਮਾਣੁ ਮਹਤੁ ਹੈ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਲਸਕਰ ਸੇਵ ਸਿਪਾਹੀ॥
column5: How great is His grandeur and magnificence and how many soldiers and armies are there in His service?

column2: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭ ਕੋ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਬੇਪਰਵਾਹੀ॥
column5: Everything is under His order is so much organised and powerful that no carelessness is there.

column2: ਹੋਰਸੁ ਪੁਛਿ ਨ ਮਤਾ ਨਿਬਾਹੀ॥੧੨॥
column5: He asks none to arrange all this.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੩. ਕੀਤੇ ਨੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ}
column5: The creation forgot the creator

column2: ਲਖ ਲਖ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੇ ਵੇਦ ਪੜ੍ਹਿ ਇਕਸ ਅਖਰ ਭੇਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਤਾ॥
column5: Even after reading lakhs of Vedas, Brahma did not understand syllable (paramatama)

column2: ਜੋਗ ਧਿਆਨ ਮਹੇਸ ਲਖ ਰੂਪ ਨ ਰੇਖ ਨ ਭੇਖੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ॥
column5: Siva meditates through lakhs of methods (postures) but still could not recognise the form, hue and guise (of the Lord).

column2: ਲਖ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਅਕਾਰ ਕਰਿ ਤਿਲੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ਨ ਬਿਸਨ ਪਛਾਤਾ॥
column5: Visnu incarnated himself through lakhs of creatures but he could not recognise even a bit of that Lord.

column2: ਲਖ ਲਖ ਨਉਤਨ ਨਾਉ ਲੈ ਲਖ ਲਖ ਸੇਖ ਵਿਸੇਖ ਨ ਤਾਤਾ॥
column5: Sesanag (the mythical snake) recited and remembered many a new name of the Lord but still could not know much about Him.

column2: ਚਿਰ ਜੀਵਨੁ ਬਹੁ ਹੰਢਣੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਪੰਥ ਨ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਿਞਾਤਾ॥
column5: Many long-lived persons experienced life variously, but they all and many a philosopher could not understand Sabda, the Brahma.

column2: ਦਾਤਿ ਲੁਭਾਇ ਵਿਸਾਰਨਿ ਦਾਤਾ॥੧੩॥
column5: All got engrossed in the gifts of that Lord and that bestower has been forgotten.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੪. ਕੀਤਾ ਕਰਤੇ ਨੂੰ ਕਿਕੂੰ ਪਾਵੇ? ਗਾਡੀ ਰਾਹ}
column5: How creation could attain the Creator? The highway ?

column2: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਆਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਹੁਇ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਧਰਾਇਆ॥
column5: The formless Lord assumed shape and getting established in the form of Guru made all to meditate upon Lord (here the hint is towards Guru Nanak).

column2: ਚਾਰਿ ਵਰਨ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਚਖੰਡੁ ਵਸਾਇਆ॥
column5: He accepted disciples from all the four varnas and founded the abode of treuth in the form of holy congregation.

column2: ਵੇਦ ਕਤੇਬਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ॥
column5: He explained the grandeur of that word of the Guru beyond the Vedas and the Katebas.

column2: ਵੀਹਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਰਤਮਾਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਇਕੀਹ ਲਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: Those who indulged in scores of evils were now put to meditate upon the Lord.

column2: ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਉਦਾਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਇਸਨਾਨ ਦਿੜਾਇਆ॥
column5: They were kept detached amidst maya and were made to understand the importance of that holy name, charity and ablution.

column2: ਬਾਰਹ ਪੰਥ ਇਕਤ੍ਰ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਡੀ ਰਾਹੁ ਚਲਾਇਆ॥
column5: Gathering the twelve sects together, he prepared a high path of gurmukhs.

column2: ਪਤਿ ਪਉੜੀ ਚੜਿ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ॥੧੪॥
column5: Following that path (or order) and mounting the stairs of honour they have all stabilised in their true selves.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੫. ਗਾਡੀ ਰਾਹ ਦੇ ਰਾਹੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖ}
column5: Gurmukhs the treaders of the highway

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪੈਰ ਧਰਿ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਵਾਟ ਕੁਵਾਟ ਨ ਧਾਇਆ॥
column5: Following the path of being gurmukh man does not read on the wrong way of uncertainty.

column2: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿਕੈ ਮਰਦਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਇਆ॥
column5: After beholding the true Guru, one does not see life, death, coming and going.

column2: ਕੰਨੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਅਨਹਦ ਰੁਣ ਝੁਣਕਾਰ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ॥
column5: Listening to the world of true Guru he becomes attuned to the unstruck melody.

column2: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣੀ ਆਇ ਕੈ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ॥
column5: Coming to the shelter of the true Guru now man absorbs in the stabilising holy congregation.

column2: ਚਰਣ ਕਵਲ ਮਕਰੰਦ ਰਸਿ ਸੁਖ ਸੰਪਟ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ॥
column5: He subsumes himself in the delight of the lotus feet.

column2: ਪਿਰਮ ਪਿਆਲਾ ਅਪਿਉ ਪੀਆਇਆ॥੧੫॥
column5: Gurmukhs remain exhilarated after quaffing the hard to drink the cup of love.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੬. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਦਾ ਜੀਵਣ ਮੁਕਤ ਪਦ}
column5: Gurmukh,the liberated one in life

column2: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਧਨਾ ਪਿਰਮ ਪਿਆਲਾ ਅਜਰੁ ਜਰਣਾ॥
column5: Adopting the discipline in the holy congregation, the unbearable cup of love is drunk and endured.

column2: ਪੈਰੀ ਪੈ ਪਾਖਾਕ ਹੋਇ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਜੀਵੰਦਿਆ ਮਰਣਾ॥
column5: Then the individual falling at the feet and eschewing ego dies in relation to all the worldly concerns.

column2: ਜੀਵਣ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਡੁਬਿ ਡੁਬਿ ਤਰਣਾ॥
column5: Liberated in life is he who dies of maya and lives up in the love of God.

column2: ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵਲੀਣੁ ਹੋਇ ਅਪਿਓ ਪੀਅਣੁ ਤੈ ਅਉਚਰ ਚਰਣਾ॥
column5: Merging his consciousness in Word and quaffing the nectar he eats up his ego.

column2: ਅਨਹਦ ਨਾਦ ਅਵੇਸ ਕਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਵਾਣੀ ਨਿਝਰੁ ਝਰਣਾ॥
column5: Inspired by the unstruck melody he always goes on pouring the word-nectar.

column2: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥ ਹੋਇ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕਰਣ ਨ ਕਾਰਣ ਕਰਣਾ॥
column5: Now he is already cause of all the causes but still does nothing harmful to others.

column2: ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣ ਅਸਰਣ ਸਰਣਾ॥੧੬॥
column5: Such a person salvages the sinners and provides shelter to the shelterless.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੭. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਦਾ ਤਰਨਾ ਤਾਰਨਾ}
column5: Remaining detached and suffering a lot the gurmukh does good to others

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੰਮਣਾ ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਹਿਣਾ ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਚਲਣਾ॥
column5: The gurmukhs take birth in the divine will, they remain in the divine will and move in the divine will.

column2: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਵਿਚਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਅਛਲੁ ਛਲਣਾ॥
column5: In the discipline and love of the holy congregation they fascinate the Lord God also.

column2: ਜਲ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਵਲੁ ਅਲਿਪਤ ਹੋਇ ਆਸ ਨਿਰਾਸ ਵਲੇਵੈ ਵਲਣਾ॥
column5: Being detached like lotus in the water they remain away from the cycle of hopes and disappointments.

column2: ਅਹਰਣਿ ਘਣ ਹੀਰੇ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਅਟਲੁ ਨ ਟਲਣਾ॥
column5: They remain steadfast like a diamond in between the hammer and the anvil and live their life deeply rooted in the wisdom of the Guru (gurmati).

column2: ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੀਅ ਦੈਆ ਮੋਮ ਵਾਂਗੀ ਢਲਣਾ॥
column5: They always imbibe altruism in their heart and in the sphere of compassion they melt like wax.

column2: ਚਾਰਿ ਵਰਨ ਤੰਬੋਲ ਰਸੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਰਲਾਇਆ ਰਲਣਾ॥
column5: As four items mix up in betel and become one, likewise the gurmukhs get adjusted with every one.

column2: ਵਟੀ ਤੇਲੁ ਦੀਵਾ ਹੋਇ ਬਲਣਾ॥੧੭॥
column5: They, in the form of lamp becoming wick and oil, burn themselves (for lighting others).

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੮. ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾਂ ਦੀ ਮੁਕਤੀ ਦੀ ਜੁਗਤਿ}
column5: The pleasure-fruit of the gurmukhs and its grandeur

column2: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਦਇਆ ਧਰਮੁ ਅਰਥ ਕਰੋੜਿ ਨ ਓੜਕੁ ਜਾਣੈ॥
column5: Crores of properties such as truth, contentment, pity, dharma, lucre are there but none could know the extremity of that (pleasure-fruit).

column2: ਚਾਰਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਆਖੀਅਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਲਖੂਣਿ ਨ ਪਲੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੈ॥
column5: Four ideals are said to be and may be they are multiplied by lakhs, even then they do not equal the one moment of pleasure fruit.

column2: ਰਿਧੀ ਸਿਧੀ ਲਖ ਲਖ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਲਖ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤੁਲਾਣੈ॥
column5: Riddhis, Siddhis and lakhs of treasures do not equal its one small fraction.

column2: ਦਰਸਨ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸੰਜੋਗ ਲਖ ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਖ ਹੈਰਾਣੈ॥
column5: Seeing the intimacy of Word and the consciousness, many combinations of philosophies and meditations are surprised.

column2: ਗਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਅਸੰਖ ਭਗਤਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਲਖਨੇਤ ਵਖਾਣੈ॥
column5: Many methods of knowledge, meditation and remembrance are put forth;

column2: ਪਿਰਮ ਪਿਆਲਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਘਰੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖਫਲ ਚੋਜ ਵਿਡਾਣੈ॥
column5: But reaching the tranquil stage, the pleasure-fruit of the cup of love of the Lord attained by gurmukhs is wondrous.

column2: ਮਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਸੁਧਿ ਲਖ ਮੇਲ ਮਿਲਾਣੈ॥੧੮॥
column5: At this stage, intellect, wisdom and millions of purities get combined.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੯. ਸੱਚ ਸ੍ਰੇਸ਼ਟ ਆਚਾਰ ਹੈ}
column5: Truthfulness is the best conduct

column2: ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮ ਲਖ ਲਖ ਹੋਮ ਜਗ ਨਈਵੇਦ ਕਰੋੜੀ॥
column5: Millions of rituals of recitation, penances, continence, burnt offerings and crores of oblations are there.

column2: ਵਰਤ ਨੇਮ ਸੰਜਮ ਘਣੇ ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਲਖ ਤੰਦੁ ਮਰੋੜੀ॥
column5: Fasts, rules, controls, activities are many but they all are like a weak thread.

column2: ਤੀਰਥ ਪੁਰਬ ਸੰਜੋਗ ਲਖ ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨੁ ਉਪਕਾਰ ਨ ਓੜੀ॥
column5: Many are pilgrimage centres, anniversaries, and millions of virtuous acts, charities and altruism's.

column2: ਦੇਵੀ ਦੇਵ ਸਰੇਵਣੇ ਵਰ ਸਰਾਪ ਲਖ ਜੋੜ ਵਿਛੋੜੀ॥
column5: Millions kinds of worship of gods and goddesses, combinations, detractions, boons, curses are there.

column2: ਦਰਸਨ ਵਰਨ ਅਵਰਨ ਲਖ ਪੂਜਾ ਅਰਚਾ ਬੰਧਨ ਤੋੜੀ॥
column5: Many philosophies, varnas, non-varnas and many are the persons who do not bother about the (unnecessary) brands of lakhs of worships and oblations.

column2: ਲੋਕ ਵੇਦ ਗੁਣ ਗਿਆਨ ਲਖ ਜੋਗ ਭੋਗ ਲਖ ਝਾੜਿ ਪਛੋੜੀ॥
column5: Many are the means of public behaviour, virtues, renunciation, indulgence and other covering devices;

column2: ਸਚਹੁ ਓਰੈ ਸਭ ਕਿਹੁ ਲਖ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਸੱਭਾ ਥੋੜੀ॥
column5: But all these are craftsmanship's remain away from the truth; they cannot touch it.

column2: ਉਪਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਅਚਾਰੁ ਚਮੋੜੀ॥੧੯॥
column5: Higher than truth is truthful living.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੦. ਸੱਚਾ ਰਾਜ}
column5: The true kingdom

column2: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਚਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਚ ਤਖਤੁ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ॥
column5: The true Guru (God) is the true emperor and the holy congregation is true throne which is most delightful.

column2: ਸਚ ਸਬਦੁ ਟਕਸਾਲ ਸਚੁ ਅਸਟਧਾਤੁ ਇਕ ਪਾਰਸ ਮੇਲਾ॥
column5: The true Word is such a true mint where different castes in the from of metals meet the Guru, the philosopher's stone, and become gold (gurmukhs).

column2: ਸਚਾ ਅਬਿਚਲੁ ਰਾਜੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਨਵਹਾਣੁ ਨਵੇਲਾ॥
column5: There, only the true divine Will operates because the order of truth alone is bestower of joy and delight.

column2: ਸਚਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਚਾ ਅਮਰੁ ਸਚੋ ਰਸ ਕੇਲਾ॥
column5: There, only the true divine Will operates because the order of truth alone is bestower of joy and delight.

column2: ਸਚੀ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਲਾਹ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹਣੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਵੇਲਾ॥
column5: There, in the early morning eulogisation is true and is of the truth alone.

column2: ਸਚਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੰਥੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਨ ਗਰਬਿ ਗਹੇਲਾ॥
column5: There, in the early morning eulogisation is true and is of the truth alone.

column2: ਆਸਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਿਰਾਸ ਗਤਿ ਸਚਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਮੇਲੁ ਸਚੁ ਖੇਲਾ॥
column5: Gurmukhs remain detached among many hopes and they always play the game of truth.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਿਖੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰ ਚੇਲਾ॥੨੦॥
column5: Such gurmukhs become Guru and the Guru becomes their disciple.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੧. ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾਂ ਦੀ ਅਲੇਪਤਾ}
column5: Non attachment of the gurmukhs

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਪਰਹਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਖਸਮੈ ਦਾ ਭਾਣਾ॥
column5: Gurmukh repudiates ego and he likes the will of God.

column2: ਪੈਰੀ ਪੈ ਪਾਖਾਕ ਹੋਇ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵੈ ਮਾਣੁ ਨਿਮਾਣਾ॥
column5: Becoming humble and falling at the feet he becomes dust and earns honour in the court of the Lord.

column2: ਵਰਤਮਾਨ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਹੋਵਣਹਾਰ ਸੋਈ ਪਰਵਾਣਾ॥
column5: He always moves in the present i.e. never ignores the contemporary situations and side by side accepts whatever is likely to happen.

column2: ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਜੋ ਕਰੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਧਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਕਰੈ ਸੁਕਰਾਣਾ॥
column5: Whatever is done by the creator of all the causes, is gratefully accepted by him.

column2: ਰਾਜੀ ਹੋਇ ਰਜਾਇ ਵਿਚਿ ਦੁਨੀਆਂ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜਿਉ ਮਿਹਮਾਣਾ॥
column5: He remains happy in the will of the Lord and considers himself a guest in the world.

column2: ਵਿਸਮਾਦੀ ਵਿਸਮਾਦ ਵਿਚਿ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਾਦਰ ਨੋ ਕੁਰਬਾਣਾ॥
column5: He remains elated in the love of the Lord and goes sacrificed unto the feats of the creator.

column2: ਲੇਪ ਅਲੇਪ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਰਬਾਣਾ॥੨੧॥
column5: Living in the world he remains detached and liberated.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੨. ਬੰਦੇ ਵਿਖੇ}
column5: The obedient person always in obedience

column2: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਬੰਦਾ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਦੇ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਹਣਾ॥
column5: One should remain in the will of the Lord by becoming an obedient servant.

column2: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭ ਕੋ ਸਭਨਾ ਆਵਟਣ ਹੈ ਸਹਣਾ॥
column5: All are in His will and all have to bear the heat of the divine order.

column2: ਦਿਲੁ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਸਮਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਗਰਬੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਵਹਣਾ॥
column5: Man should make his heart a river and let the water of humility flow into it.

column2: ਵੀਹ ਇਕੀਹ ਉਲੰਘਿ ਕੈ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਿੰਘਾਸਣਿ ਬਹਣਾ॥
column5: Leaving the worldly activities one should sit on the throne of holy congregation.

column2: ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵਲੀਣ ਹੋਇ ਅਨਭਉ ਅਘੜ ਘੜਾਏ ਗਹਣਾ॥
column5: Merging consciousness in the Word, one should get the ornament of fearlessness prepared.

column2: ਸਿਦਕ ਸਬੂਰੀ ਸਾਬਤਾ ਸਾਕਰੁ ਸੁਕਰਿ ਨ ਦੇਣਾ ਲਹਣਾ॥
column5: One should remain true in faith and contentment; the transaction of thankfulness should be kept to continue and one should remain away from worldly give and take.

column2: ਨੀਰਿ ਨ ਡੁਬਣੁ ਅਗਿ ਨ ਦਹਣਾ॥੨੨॥
column5: Such a person neither drowns in water (of maya) nor gets burnt in the fire (of desire).

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੩. ਗੁਰੂ ਅਤੇ ਸਿੱਖ ਦੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤੀ}
column5: Love between the Guru and the disiple

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਰਥ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਖਾਣਿਆ॥
column5: Gurmukhs very well understand the importance of the words first, and only then they speak them out.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਂਦੇ ਤਾਣ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਤਾਣਿਆ॥
column5: Though being powerful, the gurmukhs always consider themselves weak and humble.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਣੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਮਾਣਿਆ॥੧੩॥
column5: Because the gurmukhs are polite, they receive respects in the court of the Lord.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੪. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਰਜ਼ਾ ਦੇ ਪੁਤਲੇ}
column5: Gurmukhs always accept the divine order

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਚਲਿਆ॥
column5: Spending this life fruitfully gurmukh goes to the other world.

column2: ਸਚੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਜਾਇ ਸਚਾ ਪਿੜ ਮਲਿਆ॥
column5: There in the true court (of lord) he gets his true place.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਭਾਉ ਚਾਉ ਅਲਲਿਆ॥
column5: Repast of gurmukh is love and his delight is devoid of flirtatiousness.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਹਲੈ ਹਲਿਆ॥
column5: Gurmukh has a tranquil heart and remains steadfast even in ups and downs.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਅਲਾਉ ਭਲੀ ਹੂੰ ਭਲਿਆ॥
column5: He speaks truth and good of the good.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦੇ ਜਾਨਿ ਆਵਨਿ ਘਲਿਆ॥੧੪॥
column5: Only gurmukhs are called to the court of the Lord and they come to the world only when the Lord sends them.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੫. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਗੁਣ}
column5: Virtue of a Gurmukh

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਧਿ ਅਸਾਧੁ ਸਾਧੁ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukh accomplishes the intractable and hence is called sadhu.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਬਿਬੇਕੀ ਜਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukh has such wisdom, which is competent to separate water from milk. This is why he is called wise.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਗਤੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: The devotion of gurmukh is loving devotion.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਬਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: Since the gurmukhs attain divine knowledge, they are called knowledgeable ones (jnanis).

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰਣ ਮਤਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਨੀਸਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukhs have the wisdom fully stamped and marked by the Word.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਉੜੀ ਪਤਿ ਪਿਰਮੁ ਰਸੁ ਮਾਣੀਐ॥੧੫॥
column5: Climbing the stairs of high regards, the gurmukh enjoys the delight of love of the beloved Lord.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੬. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਤੋਂ ਲਾਭ}
column5: Gains from a gurmukh

column2: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਉ ਕਰਤਾਰ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ॥
column5: The true name of the creator Lord is received from the gurmukhs,

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਓਅੰਕਾਰੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ॥
column5: Amidst the gurmukhs the Oankar Word is remembered.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ਸਦਾ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈਐ॥
column5: Amid the gurmukhs the word is pondered upon and the consciousness is merged in it,

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਅਚਾਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ॥
column5: Living the truthful life of the gurmukhs, the truth is accomplished in life.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ॥
column5: Gurmukh is that door of liberation through which one automatically enters his innate nature (the divine self).

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਛੋਤਾਈਐ॥੧੬॥
column5: He base of name (of the Lord) is attained from gurmukhs and one does not repent in the end.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੭. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਤੋਂ ਲਾਭ}
column5: Gains from a gurmukh

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਪਰਸਿ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਹੋਈਐ॥
column5: Touching the philosopher's stone in the form of a gurmukh one himself becomes the philosophers stone.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਅਪਰਸੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਅਲੋਈਐ॥
column5: By the glimpse only of the gurmukh, all evil passions become untouchable.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਖੋਈਐ॥
column5: Meditating upon the Lord amid the gurmukhs one loses duality.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਧਨ ਰੂਪ ਨਿੰਦ ਨ ਗੋਈਐ॥
column5: In the company of the gurmukhs neither the wealth and physical beauty of others is seen nor is backbiting committed.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਉ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਿਲੋਈਐ॥
column5: In the company of gurmukhs only nectar-name in the form of Word is churned and the essence is acquired.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਸਦਾ ਜਾਇ ਅੰਤ ਨ ਰੋਈਐ॥੧੭॥
column5: In the company of gurmukhs the jiva (self) at last becomes happy and does not wail and weep.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੮. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਦਾ ਸਰੂਪ}
column5: Nature and form of gurmukh

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੰਡਿਤੁ ਹੋਇ ਜਗ ਪਰਬੋਧੀਐ॥
column5: As a knowledgeable person, the gurmukh imparts knowledge to the world.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਅੰਦਰੁ ਸੋਧੀਐ॥
column5: Losing their ego, the gurmukhs purify their inner-self.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਨ ਕਾਮੁ ਕਰੋਧੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukhs adopt truth and contentment and do not indulge in lust and anger.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਨ ਵੈਰ ਵਿਰੋਧੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukhs have no enmity and opposition towards anyone.

column2: ਚਹੁ ਵਰਨਾ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮੋਧੀਐ॥
column5: Preaching to all the four varnas, gurmukhs merge in equipoise.

column2: ਧੰਨੁ ਜਣੇਦੀ ਮਾਉ ਜੋਧਾ ਜੋਧੀਐ॥੧੮॥
column5: Blest is the mother of a gurmukh who has given birth to him and the gurmukh is the best among warriors.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੯. ਓਹੋ ਹੀ}
column5: Carefree gurmukh

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਾਹ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukh eulogises the wondrous Lord in the form.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਲਾਹ ਸਚੀ ਪਤਿਸਾਹੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukhs have true kingdom of God's praises.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਸਨਾਹੁ ਦਾਦਿ ਇਲਾਹੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukhs have armour of truth which they have been gifted by the Lord.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਡੀ ਰਾਹੁ ਸਚੁ ਨਿਬਾਹੀਐ॥
column5: For gurmukhs only the beautiful highway of truth has been prepared.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਤਿ ਅਗਾਹੁ ਗਾਹਣਿ ਗਾਹੀਐ॥
column5: Their wisdom is unfathomable and to get to it one gets perplexed.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੇਪਰਵਾਹ ਨ ਬੇਪਰਵਾਹੀਐ॥੧੯॥
column5: Gurmukh is carefree in the world but not so towards the Lord.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੦. ਉਹੋ ਹੀ}
column5: Serious and tranquil gurmukh

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਤੋਲੁ ਨ ਤੋਲਣਿ ਤੋਲੀਐ॥
column5: Gurmukh is perfect; he cannot be weighed on any scale.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਬੋਲ ਨ ਬੋਲਣਿ ਬੋਲੀਐ॥
column5: Every word by gurmukh comes to be true and perfect and nothing can be said about him.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਤਿ ਅਡੋਲ ਨ ਡੋਲਣਿ ਡੋਲੀਐ॥
column5: The wisdom of gurmukhs is stable one and does not get destabilised even if done so.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਿਰਮ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਨ ਮੋਲਣਿ ਮੋਲੀਐ॥
column5: The love of gurmukhs is invaluable and it cannot be purchased at any cost.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੰਥ ਨਿਰੋਲੁ ਨ ਰੋਲਣਿ ਰੋਲੀਐ॥
column5: The way of gurmukh is clear and distinct; it cannot be subsumed and dissipated by any one.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਲੋਲੁ ਪੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਝੋਲੀਐ॥੨੦॥
column5: The words of gurmukhs are steadfast; along with them one quaffs nectar by deleting passions and carnal desires.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੧. ਉਹੋ ਹੀ}
column5: Gurmukhs remain dormant in their self

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖਫਲ ਪਾਇ ਸਭ ਫਲ ਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: By attaining pleasure-fruit gurmukhs have received all the fruits.

column2: ਰੰਗੁ ਸੁਰੰਗੁ ਚੜ੍ਹਾਇ ਸਭ ਰੰਗ ਲਾਇਆ॥
column5: Putting on the beautiful colour of the Lord they have enjoyed the delight of all the colours.

column2: ਗੰਧ ਸੁਗੰਧਿ ਸਮਾਇ ਬੋਹਿ ਬੁਹਾਇਆ॥
column5: Merging in the fragrance (of devotion) they make everyone fragrant.

column2: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਰਸ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਇ ਸਭ ਰਸ ਆਇਆ॥
column5: They have satiated with the delight of nectar and now they feel as if they have had all the taste.

column2: ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵਲਾਇ ਅਨਹਦ ਵਾਇਆ॥
column5: Merging their consciousness in the Word they have become one with the unstruck melody.

column2: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਦਹਦਿਸਿ ਧਾਇਆ॥੨੧॥੧੯॥
column5: Now they get stabilised in their inner self and their mind does not now wonder in all the ten directions.

column2: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ॥
column5: One Oankar, the primal energy, realized through the grace of divine preceptor

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧. ਮੰਗਲਾ ਚਰਣ-ਗੁਰੂ ਵਰਣਨ}
column5: One Oankar, the primal energy, realized through the grace of divine preceptor

column2: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇਉ ਆਪੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: God himself created the true Guru Nanak.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਗੁਰਸਿਖੁ ਬਬਾਣੇ ਆਇਆ॥
column5: Becoming Sikh of the Guru, Guru Angad joined this family.

column2: ਗੁਰਸਿਖੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇਆ॥
column5: Liked by the true Guru, Guru Amar Das became Sikh of the Guru.

column2: ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ਗੁਰਸਿਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਦਵਾਇਆ॥
column5: Then Ram Das, the Sikh of the Guru came to be known as the Guru.

column2: ਗੁਰੁ ਅਰਜਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਿਖੁ ਪਰਗਟੀ ਆਇਆ॥
column5: Thereafter came Guru Arjan as the disciple of the Guru (and got established as the Guru).

column2: ਗੁਰਸਿਖੁ ਹਰਿਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਨ ਲੁਕੈ ਲੁਕਾਇਆ॥੧॥
column5: Hargobind, the Sikh of the Guru cannot remain concealed even if somebody wishes to (and this further means that all the Gurus had the same light).

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨. ਗੁਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਜੋਤ ਇੱਕ}
column5: All the Gurus had the same light

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਾਇਆ॥
column5: The Gurmukh (Guru Nanak) by becoming the philosopher's stone made all the disciples venerable.

column2: ਅਸਟ ਧਾਤੁ ਇਕੁ ਧਾਤੁ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਾਇਆ॥
column5: He illumined the people of all the varnas as the philosopher's stone converts all the right metals into gold.

column2: ਬਾਵਨ ਚੰਦਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਬੋਹਾਇਆ॥
column5: By becoming sandalwood he made all the trees fragrant.

column2: ਗੁਰਸਿਖੁ ਸਿਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਹੋਇ ਅਚਰਜੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: He accomplished the wonder of making disciple the Guru.

column2: ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਾਇ ਦੀਪੁ ਦੀਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: Extended his light similarly as a lamp is lit by another lamp.

column2: ਨੀਰੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨੀਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ॥੨॥
column5: As the water mixing with water becomes one, likewise deleting ego, the Sikh merges into the Guru.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੩. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਮਹਿੰਮਾ ਵਿਖੇ}
column5: The gurmukh

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਫਲੁ ਜਨੰਮੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: The life of that Gurmukh is successful who has met the true Guru.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰ ਕਰੰਮੁ ਸਰਣੀ ਆਇਆ॥
column5: The Gurmukh who has surrendered before the Guru is a blest one and his fate is perfect one.

column2: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੈਰੀ ਪਾਇ ਨਾਉ ਦਿੜਾਇਆ॥
column5: The true Guru, by giving him place around his feet has made him remember the name (of the Lord).

column2: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਉਦਾਸੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਮਾਇਆ॥
column5: Now being detached, he remains at home and maya does not affect him.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਕਮਾਇ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: By putting into practice the teachings of the Guru, he has realised he invisible Lord.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ॥੩॥
column5: Losing his ego, the Guru-orientated Gurmukh has become liberated though still embodied.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੪. ਓਹੋ ਹੀ}
column5: The Gurmukhs only sustain the anbearable cup of love

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪ ਗਵਾਇ ਨ ਆਪੁ ਗਣਾਇਆ॥
column5: The Gurmukhs erase their ego and never allow themselves to be noticed.

column2: ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਮਿਟਾਇ ਇਕੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ॥
column5: Effacing duality, they venerate only one Lord.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਜਾਣਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇਆ॥
column5: Accepting Guru as God they by cultivating the words of the Guru, translate them into life.

column2: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਚਲਿ ਜਾਇ ਸੀਸੁ ਨਿਵਾਇਆ॥
column5: The Gurmukhs serve and attain the fruits of happiness.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ਸੁਖ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: This way receiving the cup of love,

column2: ਪਿਰਮ ਪਿਆਲਾ ਪਾਇ ਅਜਰੁ ਜਰਾਇਆ॥੪॥
column5: They bear the effect of this unbearable in their mind.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੫. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਨਿੱਤ ਕਰਮ}
column5: Daily routine of the Gurmukh

column2: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਵੇਲੇ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਗਿ ਜਗਾਇਆ॥
column5: The Guru-orientated gets up early in the morning and makes others also to do so.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਇ ਭਰਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ॥
column5: Discarding delusions is equal to bathing at the holy places for him.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੰਤ ਸਮ੍ਹਾਲਿ ਜਾਪੁ ਜਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: Gurmukh carefully and attentively recites the moolmantar.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ॥
column5: The Gurmukh single-mindedly concentrates upon the Lord.

column2: ਮਥੈ ਟਿਕਾ ਲਾਲੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ॥
column5: The red mark of love adorns his forehead.

column2: ਪੈਰੀ ਪੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਿਖ ਪੈਰੀ ਪਾਇਆ॥੫॥
column5: Falling on the feet of the Sikhs of the Guru and thus through his own humility, he makes others surrender to his feet.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੬. ਗੁਰਸਿੱਖ ਕਮਾਈ}
column5: The earning of Gurmukh

column2: ਪੈਰੀ ਪੈ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਪੈਰ ਧੁਆਇਆ॥
column5: Touching the feet, the Sikhs of the Guru wash their feet.

column2: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਵਾਣੀ ਚਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਵਸਿ ਆਇਆ॥
column5: Then they taste the ambrosial word (of Guru) through which the mind is controlled.

column2: ਪਾਣੀ ਪਖਾ ਪੀਹਿ ਭਠੁ ਝੁਕਾਇਆ॥
column5: They fetch water, fan the sangat and put wood in the firebox of the kitchen.

column2: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਸਿਖਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਲਿਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: They listen to, write and make others write the hymns of the Gurus.

column2: ਪਵਣੈ ਪਵਣੁ ਸਮਾਇ ਅਨਹਦ ਭਾਲਿਆ॥
column5: As air after meeting the vital air becomes unstruck melody;

column2: ਹੀਰੈ ਹੀਰਾ ਬੇਧਿ ਪਰੋਇ ਦਿਖਾਲਿਆ॥
column5: As a diamond being perforated by another diamond gets stringed into a necklace;

column2: ਪਥਰੁ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਪਾਲਿਆ॥
column5: A stone by becoming the philosopher's stone performs its feat and

column2: ਅਨਲ ਪੰਖ ਪੁਤੁ ਹੋਇ ਪਿਤਾ ਸਮ੍ਹਾਲਿਆ॥
column5: As an anil bird getting birth in the sky promotes the work of its father;

column2: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਖਾਲਿਆ॥੮॥
column5: Likewise the Guru making the Sikh meet the Lord establishes him in the equipoise.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੯. ਈਸ਼੍ਵਰੀ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ}

column2: ਕੇਵਡੁ ਇਕੁ ਕਵਾਉ ਪਸਾਉ ਕਰਾਇਆ॥
column5: How great is His one vibration which has created the whole expanse of the world!

column2: ਕੇਵਡੁ ਕੰਡਾ ਤੋਲੁ ਤੋਲਿ ਤੁਲਾਇਆ॥
column5: How big is His weighing hook that it has sustained the whole creation!

column2: ਕਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਕਰੋੜਿ ਕਵਾਉ ਵਧਾਇਆ॥
column5: Creating crores of universes He has spread around His power of speech.

column2: ਲਖ ਲਖ ਧਰਤਿ ਅਗਾਸਿ ਅਧਰ ਧਰਾਇਆ॥
column5: Lakhs of earths and skies He kept hanging without support.

column2: ਪਉਣ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰ ਲਖ ਉਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: Million types of airs, waters and fires He created.

column2: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਜੋਨਿ ਖੇਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ॥
column5: He created the game of eighty four lakhs of species.

column2: ਜੋਨਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਅੰਤ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: No end is known of the creatures of even one species.

column2: ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਾਇ ਅਲੇਖੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ॥੯॥
column5: He has engraved writ on the forehead of all so that they all meditate upon the Lord who is beyond writ.

column5: Through the wisdom of Guru (Gurmati) the unbearable truth is instilled into the heart.

column2: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ਸੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਭਾਇਆ॥੧੦॥
column5: I am sacrifice unto him who loves the Will of the Lord.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੧. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਪਰਮ ਪਦ}

column2: ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਤਿਲ ਨ ਤਮਾਇ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ॥

column2: ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵਲਾਇ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮਨਾਵਣਾ॥

column2: ਚਰਣ ਕਵਲ ਰਜ ਘੋਲਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਵਾਣੀਐ॥

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੀਤਾ ਰਜ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀਐ॥੧੪॥

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੫. ਅਕੱਥ ਹੈ ਵਾਹਿਗੁਰੂ}

column2: ਲਖ ਸਾਇਰ ਨੈਸਾਣ ਬੂੰਦ ਸਮਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: Millions of oceans subsume in His one drop.

column2: ਕੂੜ ਅਖਾਣ ਵਖਾਣ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀਐ॥੧੫॥
column5: Explanations and elaborations pertaining to Him are incomplete (and fake) because His story is ineffable.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੰਥਿ ਚਲਾਇ ਚਲਣੁ ਭਾਣਿਆ॥

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇ ਚੋਜ ਵਿਡਾਣਿਆ॥
column5: Gurmukhs perceive His wondrous sport.

column2: ਵਰਤਣ ਬਾਲ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਆਦਿ ਵਖਾਣਿਆ॥
column5: They behave innocently like children and eulogize the primaeval Lord.

column2: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਹਾਣਿਆ॥

column2: ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰਾਇ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਿਞਾਣਿਆ॥

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ॥੧੬॥

column2: ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਅਥਾਹ ਹਾਥਿ ਨ ਆਣੀਐ॥
column5: It is so deep and sublime that its extent cannot be known.

column2: ਬੂੰਦ ਲਖ ਪਰਵਾਹਿ ਹੁਲੜ ਵਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: As from each drop become many tumultuous rivulets,

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਲਾਹ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: Likewise the ever-growing glory of gurmukhs becomes ineffable.

column2: ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਰਾਹੁ ਬਿਅੰਤੁ ਸੁਹਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: His shores near and far cannot be known and He is adorned in infinite ways.

column2: ਲਉਬਾਲੀ ਦਰਗਾਹ ਨ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੀਐ॥

column2: ਵਡਾ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹ ਤਾਣੁ ਨਿਤਾਣੀਐ॥
column5: The true Guru is totally carefree yet He is the power of the powerless ones.

column2: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਚੇ ਵਾਹੁ ਹੋਇ ਹੈਰਾਣੀਐ॥੧੭॥

column2: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਉ ਬਲਵੰਡੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ॥
column5: Gurmukhs adore the grand and powerful true name (of the Lord).

column2: ਪਰਮ ਜੋਤਿ ਪਰਚੰਡੁ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਜਗਾਈਐ॥
column5: There skillfully they enhance their inner flame (of knowledge).

column5: Having seen the whole universe I have found that none reaches His grandeur.

column2: ਚਾਵਲ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵੰਡੁ ਉਬਰਿ ਜਾਈਐ॥

column5: There, homogenous truth prevails and falsehood remains far behind.

column5: In Kaliyug, the dharma has only one feet and consequently has become quite feeble.

column2: ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਉਦਾਸ ਕਰਿ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ਜਪੈ ਅਜਾਪੈ॥
column5: This panth remains detached amidst maya and obliterating the sense of ego remembers the Lord spontaneously i.e. always rema

column2: ਚੰਦਨ ਭਗਤਾ ਰੂਪ ਨ ਰੇਖੀ॥੨੦॥

column2: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਵੀਹਾਂ ਦੇ ਦੰਮ ਲੈ ਇਕੁ ਰੁਪਈਆ ਹੋਛਾ ਹੋਈ॥

column2: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ॥

column5: One Onkaar,the primal energy, realized through the grace of divine preceptor

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੩. ਸੱਚਾ ਪਾਤਸ਼ਾਹ}

column5: The mastery of the true Guru is eternal because all the always present before Him (for His praises).

column2: ਅਗਮੁ ਅਡੋਲੁ ਅਤੋਲੁ ਹੈ ਤੋਲਣਹਾਰੁ ਨ ਡੰਡੀ ਛਾਬਾ॥
column5: The true Guru is beyond all measuses; He cannot be weighed on any scale.

column5: Uniform is His kingdom wherein there is no enemy, no friend and no noisy clamour

column2: ਆਦਲੁ ਅਦਲੁ ਚਲਾਇਦਾ ਜਾਲਮੁ ਜੁਲਮੁ ਨ ਜੋਰ ਜਰਾਬਾ॥
column5: The true Guru is judicious; dispenses justice and in His kingdom no atrocity and tyranny is exacted.

column2: ਜਾਹਰ ਪੀਰ ਜਗਤੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਬਾਬਾ॥੩॥
column5: Such a grand Guru (Ndnak) is the manifest spiritual teacher of the whole world.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੪. ਸੱਚਾ ਪਾਤਸ਼ਾਹ}
column5: The true emperor

column2: ਗੰਗ ਬਨਾਰਸ ਹਿੰਦੂਆ ਮੁਸਲਮਾਣਾਂ ਮਕਾ ਕਾਬਾ॥
column5: Hindus adore Ganges and Banaras and Muslims consider Mecca-Kaba as a holy place.But to the accompaniment of mradarig (drum) and rabad (stringed instrument) the praises (of Baba Nanak) are sung

column5: He himfelf is wonderful (because in spite of his powers he is egoless).

column2: ਚਾਰਿ ਵਰਨ ਇਕ ਵਰਨ ਹੋਇ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਹੋਇ ਤਰਾਬਾ॥
column5: By his efforts all the four varnas have become one and now the individual gets liberated in the holy congregatio

column2: ਚੰਦਨੁ ਵਾਸੁ ਵਣਾਸਪਤਿ ਅਵਲਿ ਦੋਮ ਨ ਸੇਮ ਖਰਾਬਾ॥
column5: Like the fragrant of sandal, he without any discrimination makes every one fragrant.

column2: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭ ਕੋ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਿਸ ਦੀ ਕਰੈ ਜਵਾਬਾ॥
column5: All act as ordained by him and no one has the power to say no to him.

column2: ਜਾਹਰ ਪੀਰੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਗੁਰ ਬਾਬਾ॥੪॥
column5: Such grand Guru (Nanak) is the manifest spiritual teacher of the whole world.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੫. ਗੁਰੂ ਅੰਗਦ ਜੀ ਆਗਮਨ}

column5: Guru Nanak created him ( Guru Angad) from his limbs as the waves are produced by Ganges out of itself.

column2: ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਗਹੀਰੁ ਗੁਣੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ਸਦਾਇਆ॥
column5: Embodied with deep and sublime attributes he (Angad) was known by gurmukhs as the form of the (imperceptible) supreme soul (paramatman).

column2: ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਦਾਤਾ ਦੇਣਿਹਾਰੁ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਲੇਪੁ ਨਾ ਲਾਇਆ॥
column5: He himself is bestower of pleasures and pains but remains always without any blot.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਚੇਲਾ ਚੇਲਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਚੇਲੇ ਪਰਚਾ ਪਰਚਾਇਆ॥
column5: The love between the Guru and the disciple was such that the disciple became Guru and the Guru disciple.

column2: ਬਿਰਖਹੁ ਫਲੁ ਫਲ ਤੇ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਪਿਉ ਪੁਤਹੁ ਪੁਤੁ ਪਿਉ ਪਤੀਆਇਆ॥
column5: It happened in the same manner as tree creates fruit and from fruit is created tree, or as father becomes happy over son and son feels happy in obeying the orders of father.

column2: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਅਲਖ ਲਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: His consiconsness merged into word and the perfect transcendental Brahm made him see the imperceptible (Lord).

column2: ਬਾਬਾਣੇ ਗੁਰ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਆਇਆ॥੫॥
column5: Now Guru Angad got established as ( the extended form of) Baba Nanak.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੬. ਗੁਰੂ ਅੰਗਦ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਸ਼}
column5: Induction of Guru Angad

column2: ਪਾਰਸੁ ਹੋਆ ਪਾਰਸਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਰਚੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਹਣਾ॥
column5: Meeting paras (the philosopher's stone Guru Nanak) Guru Angad became paras himself and because of his love for the Guru he was called the true Guru.

column2: ਚੰਦਨੁ ਹੋਇਆ ਚੰਦਨਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸ ਰਹਤਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਹਣਾ॥
column5: Living according to the preachings and code of conduct laid down by the Guru, he became sandal by meeting the sandal (Guru Nanak).

column2: ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਦੁਖ ਦਹਣਾ॥
column5: The light immersed in the light; the delight of the wisdom of Guru (gurmat) was attained and the sufferings of evil mindedness got burnt and wiped out.

column2: ਅਚਰਜ ਨੋ ਅਚਰਜੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਿਸਮਾਦੈ ਵਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਸਮਹਣਾ॥
column5: The wonder met the wonder and becoming wondrous got imbued with the wonder (Guru Nanak).

column2: ਅਪਿਉ ਪੀਅਣ ਨਿਝਰੁ ਝਰਣੁ ਅਜਰੁ ਜਰਣੁ ਅਸਹੀਅਣੁ ਸਹਣਾ॥
column5: After quaffing the nectar the fountain of joy emerges to flew and then the power of bearing the unbearable is obtained

column2: ਆਸਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਿਰਾਸ ਹੁਇ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਜੋਗੀਸਰੁ ਜੋਗੀ॥
column5: He remains detached amidst all hopes and, knowing the technique of yoga, is known as the king of yogis.

column2: ਦੇਂਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਨ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਵਿਜੋਗ ਵਿਜੋਗੀ॥
column5: He always bestows and begs nothing. Neither he dies nor he suffers the pangs of the separation from the Lord.

column2: ਆਧਿ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਉਪਾਧਿ ਹੈ ਵਾਇ ਪਿਤ ਕਫੁ ਰੋਗ ਅਰੋਗੀ॥
column5: He is not troubled by pains and maladies and he remains free from the diseases of air, cough and heat.

column2: ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸੰਪੈ ਹਰਖ ਨ ਅਪਦਾ ਸੋਗੀ॥
column5: He accepts sufferings and joys alike; wisdom of the Guru is his wealth and he is uninfluenced by joy and sorrows.

column2: ਦੇਹ ਬਿਦੇਹੀ ਲੋਗ ਅਲੋਗੀ॥੧੬॥
column5: Being embodied he is yet beyond the body and while living in the world he is beyond the world.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੭. ਗੁਰੂ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ}
column5: Guru Ram Das

column2: ਸਭਨਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਇਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੀ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਹੋਗੀ॥
column5: The master of all is one; any body else has neither existed nor ever shall be in future.

column2: ਸਹਜ ਸਰੋਵਰਿ ਪਰਮਹੰਸੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੋਤੀ ਮਾਣਕ ਚੋਗੀ॥
column5: The creatures living in the tank of equipoise of the wisdom of Guru are known as param halls (swans of highest order)and they pick up only rubies and pearls i.e. they always adopt goodness in their life.

column2: ਖੀਰ ਨੀਰ ਜਿਉ ਕੂੜੁ ਸਚੁ ਤਜਣੁ ਭਜਣੁ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਅਧੋਗੀ॥
column5: Becoming authorised of the knowledge of the Guru, they separate falsehood from truth as &visas are supposed to separate water from milk.

column2: ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕੁ ਅਰਾਧਣਾ ਪਰਿਹਰਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਦਰੋਗੀ॥
column5: Repudiating the sense of duality they adore the one Lord with single mindedness.

column2: ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਅਗਾਧਿ ਘਰੋਗੀ॥
column5: Although house holders, they, merging their consciousness in Word, in the holy congregation remain established ineffortless concentration

column2: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣਹੁ ਬਾਹਰੇ ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰ ਪਰਮਪਰ ਜੋਗੀ॥
column5: Such perfect yogis are benevolent and free from transmigration.

column2: ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰ ਸਮੋਗੀ॥੧੭॥
column5: Among such persons is Guru Ram Das who is fully absorbed in Guru Amar Das i.e. he is his constituent.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੮. ਗੁਰੂ ਅਰਜਨ ਦੇਵ ਜੀ}
column5: Guru Arjan Dev

column2: ਅਲਖ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਆਖੀਐ ਅਕਲ ਅਜੋਨਿ ਅਕਾਲ ਅਪਾਰਾ॥
column5: That Lord is without blemish, beyond birth, beyond time and is infinite.

column2: ਰਵਿ ਸਸਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਉਦੋਤ ਲੰਘਿ ਪਰਮ ਜੋਤਿ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ॥
column5: Crossing the lights of sun and the moon, Guru Arjan Dev loves the supreme light of the Lord.

column2: ਜਗਮਗ ਜੋਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰੀ ਜਗ ਜੀਵਨ ਜਗ ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਾਰਾ॥
column5: His light is ever effulgent. He is the life of the world and the whole world acclaims him.

column2: ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਦਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਆਦੇਸੁ ਉਧਾਰਾ॥
column5: All in the world salute him and he, ordained by the primal Lord, liberates one and all.

column2: ਚਾਰਿ ਵਰਨ ਛਿਅ ਦਰਸਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਸਚੁ ਅਚਾਰਾ॥
column5: Amidst the four vamas and six philosophies the way of the gurmukh is the way of adoption of truth.

column2: ਨਾਮੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਦਿੜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ॥
column5: Adopting the remebrance of the name (of Lord), charity and ablution steadfastly and with loving devotion, he (Guru Arjan Dev) gets the devoetees across ( the world ocean).

column2: ਗੁਰੂ ਅਰਜਣੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਾ॥੧੮॥
column5: Guru Arjan is the builder (of the Panth ).

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੯. ਗੁਰੂ ਅਰਜਨ ਦੇਵ}
column5: Guru Arjan Dev

column2: ਪਿਉ ਦਾਦਾ ਪੜਦਾਦਿਅਹੁ ਕੁਲ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਅਜਰਾਵਰ ਨਤਾ॥
column5: Guru Arjan Dev is the lamp of the line of his father, grand father and great grand father.

column2: ਤਖਤੁ ਬਖਤੁ ਲੈ ਮਲਿਆ ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਵਾਪਾਰਿ ਸਪਤਾ॥
column5: Having merged his consciousness into Word he in a dignified way has undertaken the task (of Guruship) and being blest st one, has assumed the authority of the throne (of the Lord).

column2: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ਭਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਕਥਾ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗ ਰਤਾ॥
column5: He is the storehouse of gurbdni (divine hymns) and remains absorbed in the eulogization (of the Lord).

column2: ਧੁਨਿ ਅਨਹਦਿ ਨਿਝਰੁ ਝਰੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਅਮਿਓ ਰਸ ਮਤਾ॥
column5: He allows the fountain of unstruck melody flow unabated and remains immersed in the nectar of perfect love.

column2: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਭਾ ਰਤਨ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਵਣਜ ਸਹਤਾ॥
column5: When the court of Guru assumes the form of holy congregation, the exchange of jewels and gems of wisdom takes place

column2: ਸਚ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੁ ਤਾਣੁ ਸਚੁ ਮਾਣੁ ਮਹਤਾ॥
column5: The true court of Guru Arjan Dev is the true mark (of grandeur) and he has attained the true honour and greatness

column2: ਅਬਚਲੁ ਰਾਜੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਣਖਤਾ॥੧੯॥
column5: The kingdom of knowledgeable (Guru Arjan Dev) is immutable.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੦. ਗੁਰੂ ਅਰਜਨ ਦੇਵ ਜੀ}
column5: Guru Arjan Dev

column2: ਚਾਰੇ ਚਕ ਨਿਵਾਇਓਨੁ ਸਿਖ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਅਗਣਤਾ॥
column5: He has conquered all the four directions and the Sikh devotees come to him in countless number.

column2: ਲੰਗਰੁ ਚਲੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਪੂਰੇ ਪੂਰੀ ਬਣੀ ਬਣਤਾ॥
column5: The free kitchen (latigar) wherein the word of the Guru is served runs unabated there and this is the perfect creation(arrangement) of the perfect Guru.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਛਤ੍ਰ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮਪਦ ਮਤਾ॥
column5: Under the canopy of the Lord, the gurmukhs attain the supreme state bestowed by the perfect Lord.

column2: ਵੇਦ ਕਤੇਬ ਅਗੋਚਰਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗੁ ਸਤਾ॥
column5: In the holy congregation, the. Word Brahm, which is beyond the Vedas and the Ketebas , is attained by gurmukhs.

column2: ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਉਦਾਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਿਖ ਜਨਕ ਅਸੰਖ ਭਗਤਾ॥
column5: The Guru has created myriad Janak-like devotees who remain detached amidst maya.

column2: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਅਬਿਗਤ ਅਬਿਗਤਾ॥
column5: The mystery of the power of His creation cannot be known and ineffable is the story of that unmanifest (Lord) .

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖ ਫਲੁ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਗਤਾ॥੨੦॥
column5: The gurmukhs receive their pleasure fruit without any effort.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੧. ਗੁਰੂ ਅਰਜਨ ਜੀ ਤੋਂ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿਗੋਬਿੰਦ}
column5: Guru Hargobind from Guru Arjan Dev

column2: ਹਰਖਹੁ ਸੋਗਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਹਰਣ ਭਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਸਰੰਦਾ॥
column5: Beyond pleasures and sorrows he is creator, sustainer and destroyer.

column2: ਰਸ ਕਸ ਰੂਪ ਨ ਰੇਖਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਾਗ ਰੰਗ ਨਿਰਲੇਪੁ ਰਹੰਦਾ॥
column5: He is away from enjoyments, repulsions, forms and even being amidst festivities, he remains detached and stabilized.

column2: ਗੋਸਟਿ ਗਿਆਨ ਅਗੋਚਰਾ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਲ ਬਚਨ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਨ ਛੰਦਾ॥
column5: Unapproable through discussions, he is beyond the powers of intellect, speech; wisdom and praise.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਹਰਿਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਸਦਾ ਵਿਗਸੰਦਾ॥
column5: Accepting Guru,(Arjan Dev) as God and God as Guru, Hargobind (the Guru)remains ever elated.

column2: ਅਚਰਜ ਨੋ ਅਚਰਜ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਿਸਮਾਦੈ ਵਿਸਮਾਦ ਮਿਲੰਦਾ॥
column5: Being full of wonder he is absorbed in the supreme :Wonder and thus being awe inspired he remains immersed in supreme rapture , rapture.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਚਲਣਾ ਖੰਡੇ ਧਾਰ ਕਾਰ ਨਿਬਹੰਦਾ॥
column5: Moving on the way of gurmukhs is like treading on the edge of sword.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਸਿਖਿ ਲੈ ਗੁਰਸਿਖੁ ਚਲੰਦਾ॥੨੧॥
column5: Accepting the teachings of the Guru, the disciple adopts them in his life.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੨. ਗੁਰੂ ਦੀ ਮਹਿਂਮਾਂ, ਸਿੱਖ ਨੂੰ ਉਪਦੇਸ਼}
column5: Glory of the Guru, teaching for the Sikh ,

column2: ਹੰਸਹੁ ਹੰਸ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਦੁਧੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਕਢੈ ਪਾਣੀ॥
column5: The gurmukhs are those swans who on the basis of their knowledge sift water (falsehood) from milk (truth).

column2: ਕਛਹੁ ਕਛੁ ਧਿਆਨ ਧਰਿ ਲਹਰਿ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਘੁੰਮਣਵਾਣੀ॥
column5: Among turtles, they are such ones who remain uninfluenced by waves and whirlpools.

column2: ਕੂੰਜਹੁ ਕੂੰਜੁ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਸਿਮਰਣੁ ਕਰਿ ਉਡੈ ਅਸਮਾਣੀ॥
column5: They are like siberian cranes who go on remembering the Lord while flying high.

column2: ਗੁਰਪਰਚੈ ਗੁਰ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਧਿਆਨਿ ਸਿਮਰਣਿ ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ॥
column5: Only by loving the Guru, the Sikh knows, understands and learns the knowledge, meditation and Gurbani, the holy hymns.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਸਿਖ ਲੈ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਹੋਇ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਜਗ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜਾਣੀ॥
column5: Having adopted the teachings of the Guru, the Sikhs become gursikhs, the Sikhs of the Guru, and join the holy congregation wherever they find it.

column2: ਪੈਰੀ ਪੈ ਪਾਖਾਕ ਹੋਇ ਗਰਬੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਆਣੀ॥
column5: The humility could be cultivated only by bowing at the feet, becoming the dust of feet of the Guru and by deleting ego from the self.

column2: ਪੀ ਚਰਣੋਦਕੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਵਾਣੀ॥੨੨॥
column5: Only such persons take feet-wash of the Guru and their speech becomes nectar (for others).

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੩. ਗੁਰੂ ਅਰਜਨ ਜੀ ਦੀ ਜੋਤੀਜੋਤ}
column5: Mingling of the light of Guru Arjan Dev with the eternal light

column2: ਰਹਿਦੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਵਿਚਿ; ਮੀਨ ਕੁਲੀਨ ਹੇਤੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੀ॥
column5: Liberating the soul from the body, Guru (Arjan Dev) stabilized himself in the water of river as the fish remains in water.

column2: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਪਤੰਗ ਜਿਉ; ਜੋਤੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ॥
column5: As the moth rows itself into the flame, his light mingled with light of the Lord.

column2: ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਮਿਰਗ ਜਿਉ; ਭੀੜ ਪਈ ਚਿਤਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਆਣੀ॥
column5: Caring of for life, as the deer keeps its consciousness concentrated when in peril, the Guru also, when undergoing suffering kept none else except the Lord in is' consciousness.

column2: ਚਰਣਕਵਲ ਮਿਲਿ ਭਵਰ ਜਿਉ; ਸੁਖ ਸੰਪਟ ਵਿਚਿ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਣੀ॥
column5: As the black bee remains enrapt in the petals of flower • enjoy fragrance, the Guru also spent night of suffering by keeping joyfully s concentration on the feet of Lord.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ; ਬਾਬੀਹੇ ਜਿਉ ਆਖ ਵਖਾਣੀ॥
column5: The Guru like a rainbird spoke to his isciples that the teachings of the Guru should not be forgotten.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖ ਫਲੁ ਪਿਰਮ ਰਸੁ; ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਜਾਣੀ॥
column5: The pleasure it of the Gurmukh (Guru Arjan Dev) is the delight of love and he accepts the holy congregation as the natural state of meditation.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਅਰਜਨ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀ॥੨੩॥
column5: I am sacrifice untoGu ru Arjan Dev.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੪. ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਗੋਬਿੰਦ}
column5: Guru Hargobind

column2: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪੂਰਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: The true Guru has been created in the form of perfect Brahm by the transcendent Brahm. Guru is God and God is the Guru; two names are of the same supreme reality.

column2: ਗੁਰੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਜੋਤਿ ਇਕ ਦੁਇ ਨਾਵ ਧਰਾਇਆ॥
column5: The son for the father and the father for the son created wonder by receiving the wondrous Word .

column2: ਪੁਤੁ ਪਿਅਹੁ ਪਿਉ ਪੁਤ ਤੇ ਵਿਸਮਾਦਹੁ ਵਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ॥
column5: A wonderful beauty has been created in the action of tree becoming fruit and fruit the tree.

column2: ਬਿਰਖਹੁ ਫਲੁ ਫਲ ਤੇ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਆਚਰਜਹੁ ਆਚਰਜੁ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ॥
column5: From the two banks of a river its true extent cannot be understood simply by saying that the one is far and the other near bank.

column2: ਨਦੀ ਕਿਨਾਰੇ ਆਖੀਅਨਿ ਪੁਛੇ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ॥
column5: Guru Arjan Dev and Guru Hargobind are in fact one and the same.

column2: ਹੋਰਨਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖੀਐ ਗੁਰੁ ਚੇਲੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: None else can perceive the imperceptible Lord but the disciple (Hargobind) having met the Guru (Arjan Dev) has visualised the imperceptible Lord.

column2: ਹਰਿ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਭਾਇਆ॥੨੪॥
column5: Guru Hargobind is dear to the Lord who is the Guru of the Gurus.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੨੫. ਖ਼ਸ਼ਟ ਗੁਰੂ ਵਰਣਨ}
column5: Description of the sixth Guru

column2: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇਉ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰਿ ਆਕਾਰ ਬਣਾਇਆ॥
column5: The formless Lord assumed the form of Guru Nanak Dev who is second all forms.

column2: ਗੁਰੁ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਅੰਗ ਤੇ ਗੰਗਹੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਤਰੰਗ ਉਠਾਇਆ॥
column5: In turn, he created Afigad from his limbs as the waves e created by Ganges.

column2: ਅਮਰਦਾਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਅੰਗਦਹੁ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਰੂਪ ਚਲਤੁ ਵਰਤਾਇਆ॥
column5: From Guru Angad came Guru Amar Das and the miracle of the transference of the light was seen by one and all.

column2: ਗੁਰੁ ਅਮਰਹੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ਅਨਹਦ ਨਾਦਹੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ॥
column5: From. Guru ar Das Rim Das came into being in such a way as if the Word was ated from the unstruck sounds.

column2: ਰਾਮਦਾਸਹੁ ਅਰਜਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦਰਪਨਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ॥
column5: Guru Arjan Dev by Guru Ram 'Ws was ated as if he is the image of the latter in the mirror.

column2: ਤਜਿ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲਈ ਸਿਰ ਧਰਿ ਜੂਠਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਸਾਬਾਸੀ॥
column5: Doing so, and divesting himself of the evil wisdom,he acquired he wisdom of Guru and as ordered by his guru he carried left overs on his head and thus earned pats from the guru.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਅਵੇਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਗਰਬਿ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਜਗਤਿ ਗੁਰਦਾਸੀ॥
column5: When inspired by the teachings f the guru he repudiated ego, the whole world accepted him as guru and became his servant .

column2: ਪੈਰੀ ਪੈ ਪਾਖਾਕ ਹੋਇ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੀ॥
column5: By falling at the feet, by becoming dust of the feet and by the wisdom of the guru, loving devotion came up in him.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖ ਫਲੁ ਸਹਜ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ॥੧੦॥
column5: As a gurmukh attaining pleasure fruit he got himself lodged in equipoise.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੧. ਗੁਰ ਸਿੱਖਾਂ ਦੀ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਖਤਾ}
column5: Virtues of the Sikhs of Guru

column2: ਰਾਜੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਹੈ ਜਨਕ ਦੇ ਵਡਾ ਭਗਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਦ ਵਖਾਣੈ॥
column5: Janak is a king as well as a yogi and the books of knowledge describe him as great devotee.

column2: ਸਨਕਾਦਿਕ ਨਾਰਦ ਉਦਾਸ ਬਾਲ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਅਤੀਤੁ ਸੁਹਾਣੈ॥
column5: Sanaks and Narad from their very childhood were of detached nature and adorned themselves with indifference to all.

column2: ਜੋਗ ਭੋਗ ਲਖ ਲੰਘਿ ਕੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਿਖ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੈ॥
column5: Going beyond millions of detachments and enjoyments, the Sikhs of Guru also remain humble m the holy congregation.

column2: ਆਪੁ ਗਣਾਇ ਵਿਗੁਚਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ਆਪੁ ਸਿਞਾਣੈ॥
column5: He who gets himself counted or noticed goes astray in illusions; but he who loses his ego infact identifies his self.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਸਚ ਦਾ ਪੈਰੀ ਪਵਣਾ ਰਾਜੇ ਰਾਣੈ॥
column5: Gurmukh' s way is the way of truth whereby all the kings and emperors fall on his feet.

column2: ਗਰਬੁ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਕੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਆਣੈ॥
column5: Treader of this path, forgetting his ego and pride cherishes humility in his heart through the wisdom of the Guru.

column2: ਸਚੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਣੁ ਨਿਮਾਣੈ॥੧੧॥
column5: Such an humble person gets respects and regards in the true court.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੨. ਚਰਣੋਦਿਕ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਖਤਾ}
column5: Virtues of the feet wash

column2: ਸਿਰੁ ਉਚਾ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਾਲਖ ਭਰਿਆ ਕਾਲੇ ਵਾਲਾ॥
column5: Proud head remains erect and high yet it is coveved by the blackness of hair.

column2: ਭਰਵਟੇ ਕਾਲਖ ਭਰੇ ਪਿਪਣੀਆਂ ਕਾਲਖ ਸੂਰਾਲਾ॥
column5: Eyebrows are full of blackness and the eye lashes are also like black thorns.

column2: ਲੋਇਣ ਕਾਲੇ ਜਾਣੀਅਨਿ ਦਾੜੀ ਮੁਛਾ ਕਰਿ ਮੁਹ ਕਾਲਾ॥
column5: Eyes are black (in India) and like wise beards and moustaches are also black.

column2: ਨਕ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨਕ ਵਾਲ ਬਹੁ ਲੂੰਇ ਲੂੰਇ ਕਾਲਖ ਬੇਤਾਲਾ॥
column5: Many trichomes are there in the nose and all of them are black.

column2: ਉਚੈ ਅੰਗ ਨ ਪੂਜੀਅਨਿ ਚਰਣ ਧੂੜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਧਰਮਸਾਲਾ॥
column5: Organs placed higher are not worshipped and the dust of the feet of gurmukhs is adorable like holy places .

column2: ਪੈਰਾ ਨਖ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਭਾਰੁ ਉਚਾਇਨਿ ਦੇਹੁ ਦੁਰਾਲਾ॥
column5: Feet and nails are blessed because they carry`the load of the whole body.

column2: ਸਿਰ ਧੋਵਣੁ ਅਪਵਿੱਤ੍ਰ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਰਣੋਦਕ ਜਗ ਭਾਲਾ॥
column5: The head wash is considered dirty but the feet wash of the gurmukhs is sought after by the whole world.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖ ਫਲ ਸਹਜੁ ਸੁਖਾਲਾ॥੧੨॥
column5: Attaining the pleasure fruit the gurmukhs in their equipoise, remain as the store house of all delights.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੩. ਈਸ਼੍ਵਰੀਯ ਰਚਨਾ}
column5: Godly creation

column2: ਜਲ ਵਿਚਿ ਧਰਤੀ ਧਰਮਸਾਲ ਧਰਤੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨੀਰ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ॥
column5: Earth, the abode for the conduct of dharma is supported by water and inside earth,too, resides water.

column2: ਚਰਣ ਕਵਲ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਧੀਰਜੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਸੁਵਾਸਾ॥
column5: Coming into the shelter of the lotus feet (of the Guru), the earth is pervaded by the fragrance of firm fortitude, and dharma.

column2: ਕਿਰਖ ਬਿਰਖ ਕੁਸਮਾਵਲੀ ਬੂਟੀ ਜੜੀ ਘਾਹ ਅਬਿਨਾਸਾ॥
column5: On it (earth) grow trees, lines of flowers, herbs and grass which never exhaust.

column2: ਸਰ ਸਾਇਰ ਗਿਰਿ ਮੇਰੁ ਬਹੁ ਰਤਨ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਭੋਗ ਬਿਲਾਸਾ॥
column5: Many a pond, ocean, mountain, jewel and pleasure giving material are there on it.

column2: ਦੇਵ ਸਥਲ ਤੀਰਥ ਘਣੇ ਰੰਗ ਰੂਪ ਰਸ ਕਸ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ॥
column5: Many godly places, pilgrimage centres, hues, forms, edibles and inedibles come forth from it.

column2: ਗੁਰ ਚੇਲੇ ਰਹਰਾਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਗੁਣਤਾਸਾ॥
column5: Owing to the tradition of the Guru-disciple, the holy congregation of the gurmukhs is also a similar ocean of virtues.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖ ਫਲੁ ਆਸ ਨਿਰਾਸਾ॥੧੩॥
column5: Remaining detached amidst hopes and desires is the pleasure fruit for the gurmukhs.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੪. ਸਾਧ ਚਰਣ ਪੂਜਾ}
column5: Worship of the feet of sadhu

column2: ਰੋਮ ਰੋਮ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਖਿਓਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਕਰੋੜਿ ਸਮਾਈ॥
column5: The Lord has subsumed crores of universes in His each trichome.

column2: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸਤਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੁਖਦਾਈ॥
column5: The true Guru form of that primal perfect and transcendental Brahm is bestower of delights.

column2: ਚਾਰਿ ਵਰਨ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਹੋਇ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ॥
column5: All the four vamas come to the shelter of the true Guru in the form of holy congregation

column2: ਗਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ਸਿਮਰਣਿ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ॥
column5: And the gurmukhs there merge their consciousness in the Word through learning, meditation and, prayer.

column2: ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਉ ਪਿਰਮ ਰਸ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਰਿਦੇ ਵਸਾਈ॥
column5: Fear of the Lord, loving devotion and the delight of love, for them, is the idol of the true Guru whom they cherish in their heart.

column2: ਏਵਡੁ ਭਾਰੁ ਉਚਾਇਂਦੇ ਸਾਧ ਚਰਣ ਪੂਜਾ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਈ॥
column5: The feet of the true Guru in the form of sadhu bear so much load (mental as well as spiritual) of their disciples that,

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖ ਫਲੁ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਾਈ॥੧੪॥
column5: 0 my brothers you, ought to worship them. The value of the pleasure fruit of the gunnukhs cannot be estimated.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੫. ਅਨੵਾਈ ਰਾਜੇ}
column5: Unjust kings

column2: ਵਸੈ ਛਹਬਰ ਲਾਇਕੈ ਪਰਨਾਲੀਂ ਹੁਇ ਵੀਹੀਂ ਆਵੈ॥
column5: When it rains cats and dogs, the water flowing through gargoyles comes down in the streets.

column2: ਲਖ ਨਾਲੇ ਉਛਲ ਚਲਨਿ ਲਖ ਪਰਵਾਹੀ ਵਾਹ ਵਹਾਵੈ॥
column5: Millions of streams overflowing become millions of currents.

column2: ਲਖ ਨਾਲੇ ਲਖ ਵਾਹਿ ਵਹਿ ਨਦੀਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰਲੇ ਰਲਾਵੈ॥
column5: Millions of rivulets join the currents of rivers.

column2: ਨਉ ਸੈ ਨਦੀ ਨੜਿੰਨਵੈ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਪਛਮਿ ਹੋਇ ਚਲਾਵੈ॥
column5: Nine hundred and ninety nine rivers flow in the east and the west directions.

column2: ਨਦੀਆ ਜਾਇ ਸਮੁੰਦ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੰਗਮੁ ਹੋਇ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ॥
column5: Rivers go to meet the sea.

column2: ਸਤਿ ਸਮੁੰਦ ਗੜਾੜ ਮਹਿ ਜਾਇ ਸਮਾਹਿ ਨ ਪੇਟੁ ਭਰਾਵੈ॥
column5: Seven such seas merge into the oceans but still the oceans are not satiated.

column2: ਜਾਇ ਗੜਾੜੁ ਪਤਾਲ ਹੇਠਿ ਹੋਇ ਤਵੇ ਦੀ ਬੂੰਦ ਸਮਾਵੈ॥
column5: In the nether world, such oceans also look like a drop of water on a hot plate.

column2: ਸਿਰ ਪਤਿਸਾਹਾ ਲਖ ਲਖ ਇੰਨਣੁ ਜਾਲਿ ਤਵੇ ਨੋ ਤਾਵੈ॥
column5: To heat this plate, millions of heads of the emperors are used as fuel.

column2: ਮਰਦੇ ਖਹਿ ਖਹਿ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਦਾਵੈ॥੧੫॥
column5: And these emperors staking their claims on this earth go on fighting and dying.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੬. ਦੋ ਪਾਤਸ਼ਾਹ-ਵੀਹ ਫਕੀਰ}
column5: Two Kings and twenty faquirs -

column2: ਇਕਤੁ ਥੇਕੈ ਦੁਇ ਖੜਗੁ ਦੁਇ ਪਾਤਸਾਹ ਨ ਮੁਲਕਿ ਸਮਾਣੈ॥
column5: In one sheath two swords and two emperors in one country cannot be accommodated;

column2: ਵੀਹ ਫਕੀਰ ਮਸੀਤਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਖਿੰਥ ਖਿੰਧੋਲੀ ਹੇਠਿ ਲੁਕਾਣੈ॥
column5: But twenty faquirs in one mosque under one patched blanket can remain (comfortably).

column2: ਜੰਗਲ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸੀਹ ਦੁਇ ਪੋਸਤ ਡੋਡੇ ਖਸਖਸ ਦਾਣੈ॥
column5: Emperors are like two lions in a jungle whereas the faquirs are like the opium seeds in one pod.

column2: ਸੂਲੀ ਉਪਰਿ ਖੇਲਣਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਧਰਿ ਛਤ੍ਰ ਬਜਾਰ ਵਿਕਾਣੈ॥
column5: These seeds play on the 'bed of thorns before they get the honour of selling in the market.

column2: ਕੋਲੂ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਪੀੜੀਅਨਿ ਪੋਸਤਿ ਪੀਹਿ ਪਿਆਲੇ ਛਾਣੈ॥
column5: They are rushed in the press with water before they are strained into the cup .

column2: ਲਉਬਾਲੀ ਦਰਗਾਹ ਵਿਚਿ ਗਰਬੁ ਗੁਨਾਹੀ ਮਾਣੁ ਨਿਮਾਣੈ॥
column5: In the court of the fearless Lord, the proud ones are called sinners and the humble get respects and regards.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਂਦੇ ਤਾਣਿ ਨਿਤਾਣੈ॥੧੬॥
column5: That is why the gurmukhs though powerful behave as the meek ones.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੭. ਬੱਕਰੀ}
column5: She goat

column2: ਸੀਹ ਪਜੂਤੀ ਬਕਰੀ ਮਰਦੀ ਹੋਈ ਹੜ ਹੜ ਹਸੀ॥
column5: A goat was caught by a lion and while about to die, it gave out a horse­ laugh.

column2: ਸੀਹੁ ਪੁਛੈ ਵਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਹੋਇ ਇਤੁ ਅਉਸਰ ਕਿਤੁ ਰਹਸਿ ਰਹਸੀ॥
column5: The surprised lion asked why it was so happy at such a moment (of its death).

column2: ਬਿਨਉ ਕਰੇਂਦੀ ਬਕਰੀ ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਅਸਾਡੇ ਕੀਚਨਿ ਖਸੀ॥
column5: Humbly the goat replied that the testicals of our male progeny are crushed in order to castrate them.

column2: ਅਕ ਧਤੂਰਾ ਖਾਧਿਆ ਕੁਹਿ ਕੁਹਿ ਖਲ ਉਖਲਿ ਵਿਣਸੀ॥
column5: We eat only wild plants of arid regions yet our skin is peeled and pounded.

column2: ਮਾਸੁ ਖਾਨਿ ਗਲ ਵਢਿਕੈ ਹਾਲੁ ਤਿਨਾੜਾ ਕਉਣੁ ਹੋਵਸੀ॥
column5: I think about the plight of those (like you) who cut the throat of others and eat their flesh.

column2: ਗਰਬੁ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਦੇਹ ਖੇਹ ਖਾਜੁ ਅਖਾਜੁ ਅਕਾਜੁ ਕਰਸੀ॥
column5: The body of both of the proud and the humble will become dust ultimately, but, even then the body of the arrogant (lion) is inedible and that of the humble (goat) attaims the status of edible.

column2: ਜਗਿ ਆਇਆ ਸਭ ਕੋਇ ਮਰਸੀ॥੧੭॥
column5: All who came to this world have to die ultimately.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੮. ਗੁਰਮੁਖ}
column5: Gurmukh

column2: ਚਰਣ ਕਵਲ ਰਹਰਾਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੀ॥
column5: By remaining in and around the lotus feet, the gurmukh receives the light of the holy congregation.

column2: ਪੈਰੀ ਪੈ ਪਾਖਾਕ ਹੋਇ ਲੇਖ ਅਲੇਖ ਅਮਰ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ॥
column5: Worshipping the feet and becoming the dust of the feet one becomes detached , immortal and indestructible .

column2: ਕਰਿ ਚਰਣੋਦਕੁ ਆਚਮਨ ਆਧਿ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਉਪਾਧਿ ਖਲਾਸੀ॥
column5: Drinking the ash of the feet of gurmukhs, freedom from all physical mental and spiritual ailments is attained.

column2: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕਰਨਿ ਉਦਾਸੀ॥
column5: Through the wisdom of the Guru they lose, their ego and do not get absorbed in maya.

column2: ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਲਿਵਲੀਣੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਸਚਖੰਡਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ॥
column5: Absorbing their consciousness in the word, they reside in the true abode (holy congregation) of the formless one.

column2: ਅਬਿਗਤਿ ਗਤਿ ਅਗਾਧਿ ਬੋਧਿ ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਅਚਰਜ ਗੁਰਦਾਸੀ॥
column5: The tale of the servants of the Lord is unfathomable ineffable and Manifest.

column2: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖ ਫਲੁ ਆਸ ਨਿਰਾਸੀ॥੧੮॥
column5: Remaining indifferent to hopes is the pleasure fruit of the Gurmukhs.

column2: {ਪਉੜੀ ੧੯. ਸਤਿਸੰਗ ਨਿਰਦੋਖ ਤਾਰਦਾ ਹੈ}
column5: Holy congregation liberates even the knaves

column2: ਸਣ ਵਣ ਵਾੜੀ ਖੇਤੁ ਇਕੁ ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰੁ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਜਣਾਵੈ॥
column5: Hemp and cotton grow in the same field but the use of one is benevolent while the other one is put to evil use.

column2: ਖਲ ਕਢਾਹਿ ਵਟਾਇ ਸਣ ਰਸਾ ਬੰਧਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਬਨ੍ਹਾਵੈ॥
column5: After peeling off the hemp plant rope is made whose nooses are used to tie people in bondage.

column2: ਖਾਸਾ ਮਲਮਲ ਸਿਰੀਸਾਫੁ ਸੂਤੁ ਕਤਾਇ ਕਪਾਹ ਵੁਣਾਵੈ॥
column5: On the other hand, from cotton are made coarse cloth muslin and sirisaf.

column2: ਲਜਣੁ ਕਜਣੁ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਸਾਧੁ ਅਸਾਧੁ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਬਿਰਦਾਵੈ॥
column5: Cotton in the form of cloth covers the modesty of others and protects the dharma of sadhus as well as wicked persons.

column2: ਸੰਗ ਦੋਖ ਨਿਰਦੋਖ ਮੋਖ ਸੰਗ ਸੁਭਾਉ ਨ ਸਾਧੁ ਮਿਟਾਵੈ॥
column5: The sadhus even when they associate with the evil never repudiate their saintly nature.

column2: ਤ੍ਰਪੜੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਧਰਮਸਾਲ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਗ ਧੂੜਿ ਧੁਮਾਵੈ॥
column5: When the hemp transformed into coarse cloth is brought to the holy places for spreading in the holy congregation, it also becomes blest after coming in touch with the dust of the feet of the sadhus.

column2: ਕੁਟਿ ਕੁਟਿ ਸਣ ਕਿਰਤਾਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਲਿਖਿ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਸੁਨਾਵੈ॥
column5: Also, when after getting a thorough beating paper is made of it, the holy men write praises of the Lord.on it and recite the same for others.
